message:
feat(tokio-compat): add safe blocking bridge with Cx context propagation (asupersync-2oh2u.7.6)

Implement block_on_sync, block_with_cx, and with_cx_sync primitives that
bridge sync/async boundaries while preserving all 5 adapter invariants:
- INV-1: Explicit Cx parameter (no ambient sniffing)
- INV-2: Pool-tracked blocking tasks
- INV-3: Cancellation mode support (BestEffort/Strict/TimeoutFallback)
- INV-4: Pool handle tracks task lifecycle
- INV-5: BlockingOutcome enum (Ok/Cancelled/Panicked)

Includes 19 unit tests covering invariant verification, context propagation,
panic capture, cancellation modes, and outcome methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
